title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
You can reach us for Central Civil, Defence and Railway pension-related grievances at the following Contact numbers or write to us at . In case your grievance is not resolved satisfactorily within 8 working days of your registering the complaint, you may approach the appointed Pension Nodal Officers [PNOs] or officers at the Centralised Pension Processing Centre (CPPC), Belapur.
###### Documentation for Opening of Saving Account for Central Government Pensioners
##### Dearness Relief rate has been changed to 60% w.e.f. January 01, 2026 
Please contact your branch for updation of same in Pensioner's Portion of PPO Book.
###### Central Pension Accounting Office (CPAO) has launched a DIRGHAYU Pensioners’ Mobile App facility for use of all central civil pensioners on 27.02.2023. All Central Civil Pensioners/Family Pensioners can download it from Google play store.
